title: 500PCS Safety Pins, 0.75Inch/19mm Small Safety pins, Rust Resistant Nickel Plated Steel Set for Crafting, Sewing, Rimming Fastening Clip Button for Garment Hang Tag (Gold)
features: Material: The safety pins are made of metal and are strong enough to be reused.these pins are commonly used to fasten pieces of fabric or clothing together.
Size: 19mm x 5mm / 0.75 inch x 0.2 inch (L * W), Safety pins feature a safety clasp which keeps the pins locked and cover the sharp end to ensure safe use.
Application: Suitable for labels, sewing, crafts, and some jewelry making.Safety pins cover the end of the pin to protect the user from the sharp point.
Widely Used: Ideal for personal or professional craft projects, patching up quilts and thick wool blankets at home, DIY style or adjusting your garment accessories such as jeans and caps.
Package includes: There are about 500 safety pins, Manual counting is subject to error.If you have any problem with the quantity, please contact us.
description: Safety pins feature a safety clasp which keeps the pins locked and cover the sharp end to ensure safe use. Specifications: Product Name:Safety Pins Material:Metal Color:Silver Size:19 x 4mm/0.75" x 0.16" ( L X W) Package include: 500 x Safety Pins
